audit_items.proof_trace: In the LDAP_CONNECTIONLESS UDP path of ldap_pvt_connect (L431), ldap_memcalloc() is called and its result stored directly to ld->ld_options.ldo_peer with no NULL check; the very next line (L432) passes ldo_peer as the destination of AC_MEMCPY, dereferencing NULL if allocation fails. No guard exists between the assignment and the memcpy.
audit_items.attack_scenario: When LDAP_CONNECTIONLESS is compiled in, an attacker that induces OOM (e.g., via memory exhaustion from many concurrent CLDAP/UDP connections) triggers the NULL-return from ldap_memcalloc, causing AC_MEMCPY to write to address 0 and crash the process (DoS via null pointer dereference).
